name: Sinotruk Jinan Truck Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinotruk Jinan Truck Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells heavy-duty trucks, special vehicles, heavy-duty special vehicle chassis, passenger car chassis, and auto parts in China and internationally. The company was formerly known as CNHTC Jinan Truck Co., Ltd. Sinotruk Jinan Truck Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Jinan, China. Sinotruk Jinan Truck Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Sinotruck (Hong Kong) Limited.
